function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: "2026-04-19T10:00:00Z"
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest two invoices linked to the Helios tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter): INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write appears valid: attachments were both read and ordered newest-first within selected pair (2026-01-19 then 2025-12-18), recipient matches Miles canonical email, and subject with colon-space is quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox file; deletion rule satisfied because inbox file was read earlier.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit completion report with grounding refs
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record successfully at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-04-19T10-00-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task was 'Work the oldest inbox message.' Completed by reading lowest inbox file, validating sender identity via canonical entity, resolving tax-firm client linkage through canonical entity + invoice records, creating outbound draft reply with requested oldest 2 linked invoices, then deleting processed inbox file. Completeness: request asked for 2 oldest linked invoices; identified Helios-linked invoice set and selected oldest two by issued_on/date in filenames: 2025-12-18 and 2026-01-19. Attachment ordering rule enforced newest-first in outbox attachments: 2026-01-19 first, then 2025-12-18.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request by preparing an outbound reply draft with the two oldest invoices linked to the Helios tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter), then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in each entered lane, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, created outbound record per sending-email workflow, kept attachment list newest-first, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox message explicitly requested a reply with the oldest 2 invoices linked to the tax-firm client. Canonical evidence linked Claudia Reiter (consulting client at helios-tax.example) to Helios invoices; the two oldest linked invoice records read were INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19). An outbound draft was written to Miles and the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.

read two oldest linked invoice files
